cache.x-prompt: Would you like to install normalized caching support (@dumbql/cache)?

subscriptions.x-prompt: Would you like to install WebSocket subscriptions support (@dumbql/subscriptions)?

upload.x-prompt: Would you like to install GraphQL file upload support (@dumbql/file-upload)?

middlewares.description: Install `@dumbql/middlewares` for focus-refetch, retry, offline-queue, auth-refresh, and cost-estimation?
middlewares.x-prompt: Would you like to install auxiliary middlewares (@dumbql/middlewares)?

devtools.description: Enable and configure the DumbQL GraphQL Debugger DevTools?
devtools.x-prompt: Would you like to configure the DumbQL DevTools debugger link?

telemetry.description: Install `@dumbql/opentelemetry` for W3C Trace Context tracing and observability?
telemetry.x-prompt: Would you like to install OpenTelemetry tracing support (@dumbql/opentelemetry)?

persistedQueries.description: Install `@dumbql/persisted-queries` for automatic persisted queries (APQ) with SHA-256 hashing?
persistedQueries.x-prompt: Would you like to install persisted queries support (@dumbql/persisted-queries)?

pagination.description: Install `@dumbql/pagination` for cursor and offset-based pagination helpers?
pagination.x-prompt: Would you like to install pagination helpers (@dumbql/pagination)?

fragments.description: Install `@dumbql/fragments` for type-safe fragment definitions and composition?
fragments.x-prompt: Would you like to install fragment utilities (@dumbql/fragments)?

ssr.description: Install `@dumbql/ssr` for Server-Side Rendering (TransferState cache transfer + streaming)?
ssr.x-prompt: Would you like to install SSR support (@dumbql/ssr)?

testing.description: Install `@dumbql/testing` for mock GraphQL backend in unit tests?
testing.x-prompt: Would you like to install testing utilities (@dumbql/testing)?

debugging.description: Install `@dumbql/debugging` for operation recording, field tree parsing, and deep inspection?
debugging.x-prompt: Would you like to install debugging utilities (@dumbql/debugging)?

nullOverlay.description: Auto-add <app-null-overlay /> to your root component for null-detection visual feedback?
nullOverlay.x-prompt: Would you like to auto-install the Null Detection overlay (<app-null-overlay />)?
